sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n37365" key="e)ci/drwsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐξίδρωσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n37365.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">violent sweat,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.949e</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:46" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.46</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
